description: Top brands across all registered vehicle types. Use when user asks most common makes across all vehicles. Passenger-car only: dmr-car-top-brands.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" | STATS vehicle_count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | SORT vehicle_count DESC | LIMIT 20
